name: Cool Veggie Pizza Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 8 Ounces PHILADELPHIA BRAND Cream Cheese, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Unroll dough into 4 rectangles and press onto the bottom and sides of a 15x10x1-inch baking pan to form crust.
3. Bake for 11 to 13 minutes, or until golden brown; cool.
4. Mix cream cheese, salad dressing, dill weed, and onion salt until well blended.
5. Spread mixture over crust and top with remaining ingredients.
6. Refrigerate and cut into squares.
7. Makes 24 servings.
